$schema_comment: Schema template for new partners. Copy this file, rename to <partner_id>.json, fill in all fields. See README.md for field descriptions.
description: Short description shown in meta tags and OG previews
$co_brand_partner_comment: Partner display name for co-brand credit ('x Partner' in hero, 'Powered by Partner' in footer). null = no co-brand (default OxPulse). Example: "RVPN".
$canonical_override_comment: Override canonical URL for SEO consolidation under unified OxPulse brand. null = use domains[0]. For partner mirrors set to "https://oxpulse.chat/".
